title: In-Flight Refueling
description: Operates aerial refueling systems to transfer fuel to receiver aircraft in flight.

title: Flight Engineer
description: Monitors and manages aircraft systems, fuel, and performance during flight operations.

title: Aircraft Loadmaster
description: Plans, loads, and manages cargo and personnel on military transport aircraft.

title: Airborne Mission Systems
description: Operates and maintains airborne communication, navigation, and mission systems.

title: Airborne Operations
description: Operates airborne command and control and special mission aircraft systems.

title: Flight Attendant
description: Provides in-flight services and safety briefings on VIP and special mission aircraft.

title: Aerial Gunner
description: Operates and maintains weapons systems on gunship and other armed aircraft.

title: Airborne Cryptologic Language Analyst
description: Collects and analyzes foreign language signals intelligence from airborne platforms.

title: Airborne ISR Operator
description: Operates intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance systems on manned aircraft.

title: Special Mission Aviator
description: Performs specialized aviation duties on unconventional and special operations aircraft.

title: Cyber Warfare Operations
description: Conducts offensive and defensive cyberspace operations to protect and exploit networks.

title: Aviation Resource Management
description: Manages aviation records, flight authorizations, and aircrew training documentation.

title: Air Traffic Controller
description: Directs aircraft movement in controlled airspace and at airfields to ensure safe operations.

title: Combat Controller
description: Provides air traffic control, fire support, and special operations forces command and control in hostile environments.

title: Command and Control Operations
description: Manages and operates command post communications and battle management systems.

title: Tactical Air Control Party
description: Provides terminal attack control for close air support and coordinates air-ground integration.

title: Command and Control Battle Management Operations
description: Operates battle management systems supporting aerospace control and warning missions.

title: Space Systems Operations
description: Operates and maintains satellite command and control systems and space surveillance systems.

title: Airfield Management
description: Manages airfield operations, coordinates aircraft movement, and ensures safe airfield conditions.

title: Ground Radar Systems
description: Operates and maintains ground-based radar systems for air traffic control and surveillance.

title: Airfield Systems
description: Maintains and operates airfield lighting, navigational aids, and ground systems.

title: Radar, Airfield and Weather Systems
description: Maintains and operates radar, airfield, and meteorological electronic systems.

title: All Source Intelligence Analyst
description: Collects, processes, and analyzes intelligence from multiple sources to support mission planning.

title: Geospatial Intelligence
description: Analyzes imagery and geospatial data to produce intelligence products.

title: Signals Intelligence Analyst
description: Collects and analyzes signals intelligence to identify threats and support operations.

title: Cryptologic Language Analyst
description: Transcribes and translates foreign language communications for intelligence purposes.

title: Fusion Analyst
description: Integrates multi-source intelligence to produce comprehensive threat assessments.

title: Human Intelligence Specialist
description: Collects and reports human intelligence through direct interaction with sources.

title: Aircrew Flight Equipment
description: Maintains life support and survival equipment for aircrews including parachutes, oxygen systems, and helmets.

title: Safety
description: Manages safety programs, investigates mishaps, and enforces occupational safety standards.

title: Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape
description: Trains aircrews and special operations forces in survival, evasion, resistance, and escape techniques.

title: Pararescue
description: Performs combat search and rescue and emergency medical treatment in hostile environments.

title: Remotely Piloted Aircraft Sensor Operator
description: Operates sensors and weapons systems on remotely piloted aircraft conducting ISR and strike missions.

title: Remotely Piloted Aircraft Pilot
description: Pilots remotely piloted aircraft for ISR, strike, and special operations missions.

title: Weather
description: Collects and analyzes meteorological data to provide weather forecasts and support military operations.

title: Special Operations Weather
description: Provides weather support for special operations forces in austere and hostile environments.

title: Avionics Test Stations and Components
description: Tests, troubleshoots, and repairs avionics components using automated test equipment.

title: SOF/PR Integrated Communication/Navigation/Mission Systems
description: Maintains integrated communication, navigation, and mission systems on SOF and personnel recovery aircraft.

title: SOF/PR Integrated Instrument and Flight Control Systems
description: Maintains instrument and flight control systems on special operations and personnel recovery aircraft.

title: SOF/PR Integrated Electronic Warfare Systems
description: Maintains electronic warfare and radar systems on special operations and personnel recovery aircraft.

title: Tactical Aircraft Maintenance
description: Performs organizational-level maintenance on tactical fighter and attack aircraft.

title: Fighter Aircraft Integrated Avionics
description: Maintains integrated avionics systems on fighter aircraft including radar and weapons systems.

title: Advanced Fighter Aircraft Integrated Avionics
description: Maintains advanced avionics systems on 5th-generation fighter aircraft.

title: Tactical Aircraft Maintenance (5th Generation)
description: Performs maintenance on 5th-generation stealth tactical aircraft systems.

title: Remotely Piloted Aircraft Maintenance
description: Performs maintenance on remotely piloted aircraft systems and ground control stations.

title: Airlift/Special Mission Aircraft Maintenance
description: Performs organizational-level maintenance on airlift and special mission aircraft.

title: Helicopter/Tiltrotor Aircraft Maintenance
description: Maintains rotary-wing and tiltrotor aircraft systems including MH-53 and CV-22 platforms.

title: Mobility Air Forces Electronic Warfare Systems
description: Maintains electronic warfare systems on mobility aircraft including C-130 and C-17.

title: Refuel/Bomber Aircraft Maintenance
description: Performs maintenance on refueling and bomber aircraft such as KC-135, KC-46, and B-52.

title: Aerospace Propulsion
description: Maintains and repairs jet engines and propulsion systems on military aircraft.

title: Aerospace Ground Equipment
description: Maintains ground support equipment used to service aircraft including power units and compressors.

title: Aircrew Egress Systems
description: Maintains ejection seats and emergency escape systems on military aircraft.

title: Aircraft Fuel Systems
description: Maintains aircraft fuel tanks, bladders, and fuel system components.

title: Aircraft Hydraulic Systems
description: Maintains hydraulic systems that operate landing gear, flight controls, and braking systems.

title: Aircraft Electrical and Environmental Systems
description: Maintains aircraft electrical wiring, lighting, and environmental control systems.

title: Aircraft Metals Technology
description: Fabricates and repairs aircraft metal structures using welding, machining, and sheet metal techniques.

title: Nondestructive Inspection
description: Inspects aircraft structures and components using X-ray, ultrasonic, and other NDI methods.

title: Aircraft Structural Maintenance
description: Repairs and maintains aircraft structural components including skin, frames, and control surfaces.

title: Survival Equipment
description: Maintains parachutes, life rafts, and other survival equipment for aircrews.

title: Low Observable Aircraft Structural Maintenance
description: Maintains stealth coatings and low observable structural features on B-2 and F-22 aircraft.

title: Mobility Air Forces Integrated Communication/Navigation/Mission Systems
description: Maintains communication, navigation, and mission systems on C-17, C-5, and similar aircraft.

title: Mobility Air Forces Integrated Instrument and Flight Control Systems
description: Maintains instruments and flight control systems on mobility aircraft.

title: Bomber/Special Integrated Communication/Navigation/Mission Systems
description: Maintains integrated avionics systems on bomber aircraft such as B-1, B-2, and B-52.

title: Bomber/Special Integrated Instrument and Flight Control Systems
description: Maintains instrument and flight control systems on bomber aircraft.

title: Bomber/Special Electronic Warfare and Radar Surveillance Integrated Avionics
description: Maintains electronic warfare and radar systems on bomber and special operations aircraft.

title: Satellite, Wideband, and Telemetry Systems
description: Installs, operates, and maintains satellite communication terminals and wideband systems.

title: Meteorological and Navigation Systems
description: Maintains meteorological data collection systems and navigation aids.

title: Ground Radio Communications
description: Installs and maintains ground-based radio communication systems.

title: Visual Imagery and Intrusion Detection Systems
description: Installs and maintains surveillance cameras, sensors, and base security systems.

title: Fuels
description: Manages and operates fuel storage, distribution, and aircraft refueling operations.

title: Logistics Plans
description: Develops and manages logistics plans to support military operations and deployments.

title: Missile and Space Systems Electronic Maintenance
description: Maintains electronic systems on ICBMs and space launch vehicles.

title: Missile and Space Systems Maintenance
description: Performs mechanical maintenance on intercontinental ballistic missiles and space systems.

title: Missile and Space Facilities
description: Maintains launch facility infrastructure, utilities, and support systems for missile operations.

title: Precision Measurement Equipment Laboratory
description: Calibrates and certifies test and measurement equipment to ensure accuracy across maintenance operations.

title: Maintenance Management Analysis
description: Analyzes maintenance data and metrics to improve aircraft availability and resource management.

title: Maintenance Management Production
description: Schedules and tracks maintenance production to optimize aircraft readiness.

title: Materiel Management
description: Manages inventory, ordering, storage, and distribution of Air Force parts and supplies.

title: Supply Systems Analysis
description: Analyzes supply chain data and manages logistics systems for Air Force operations.

title: Traffic Management
description: Manages movement of cargo, passengers, and household goods through military and commercial transportation.

title: Ground Transportation
description: Operates and maintains military vehicles including trucks, buses, and special purpose vehicles.

title: Air Transportation
description: Loads, unloads, and manages cargo and passenger movement on military aircraft.

title: Mission Generation Vehicular Equipment Maintenance
description: Maintains and repairs a variety of military vehicles and support equipment.

title: Special Vehicle Maintenance
description: Maintains specialized vehicles such as fire trucks, ambulances, and airfield equipment.

title: Fleet Management and Analysis
description: Manages vehicle fleet records, maintenance scheduling, and transportation data systems.

title: Munitions Systems
description: Stores, assembles, and delivers conventional munitions and maintains armament systems.

title: Aircraft Armament Systems
description: Maintains aircraft-mounted guns, bomb racks, missile launchers, and armament systems.

title: Nuclear Weapons
description: Maintains, assembles, and stores nuclear weapons systems and components.

title: Knowledge Operations Management
description: Manages information systems, records, and knowledge management programs.

title: Cyber Systems Operations
description: Operates and administers cyberspace systems and network infrastructure.

title: Cybersecurity
description: Implements and manages cybersecurity programs and defends Air Force information systems.

title: Computer Systems Programming
description: Develops, tests, and maintains software applications and systems for Air Force operations.

title: Client Systems
description: Installs, configures, and maintains client computers, peripherals, and network devices.

title: Cyber Transport Systems
description: Installs and maintains wired and wireless network infrastructure and transport systems.

title: RF Transmission Systems
description: Installs and maintains radio frequency communication systems including microwave and satellite links.

title: Spectrum Operations
description: Manages radio frequency spectrum use and ensures electromagnetic compatibility.

title: Cable and Antenna Systems
description: Installs and maintains outside plant cabling, antennas, and transmission line systems.

title: Electrical Systems
description: Installs and maintains electrical power distribution systems and wiring on Air Force installations.

title: Electrical Power Production
description: Operates and maintains generators, electrical power production, and distribution equipment.

title: Heating, Ventilation, AC, and Refrigeration
description: Maintains HVAC systems, refrigeration equipment, and environmental controls on installations.

title: Pavements and Construction Equipment
description: Constructs and maintains airfield pavements, roads, and operates heavy construction equipment.

title: Structural
description: Constructs and maintains buildings, facilities, and structures on Air Force installations.

title: Water and Fuel Systems Maintenance
description: Maintains water treatment, distribution, and fuel system infrastructure on installations.

title: Pest Management
description: Controls insects, rodents, and other pests to protect personnel and facilities.

title: Engineering
description: Provides engineering support for construction projects, facility planning, and infrastructure management.

title: Operations Management
description: Manages civil engineer unit operations, readiness, and disaster response programs.

title: Fire Protection
description: Responds to structural and aircraft fires, performs rescue operations, and enforces fire safety.

title: Explosive Ordnance Disposal
description: Identifies, renders safe, and disposes of conventional, nuclear, biological, and chemical munitions.

title: Emergency Management
description: Plans and executes responses to chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear, and explosive events.

title: Personnel
description: Manages military personnel actions including assignments, promotions, separations, and records.

title: Services
description: Manages food service, lodging, recreation, and mortuary affairs programs.

title: Education and Training
description: Manages professional military education and training programs for Air Force personnel.

title: Manpower
description: Analyzes and manages manpower requirements and organizational structure for Air Force units.

title: Equal Opportunity
description: Advises commanders on equal opportunity issues and investigates discrimination complaints.

title: Administration
description: Performs administrative functions including correspondence, records management, and office procedures.

title: Historian
description: Researches, writes, and preserves official Air Force historical records and publications.

title: Public Affairs
description: Manages media relations, community outreach, and internal communication programs.

title: Broadcast Journalist
description: Produces and presents radio and television news and information programming.

title: Photojournalist
description: Documents military operations and events through photography and videography.

title: Regional Band
description: Performs as a musician in Air Force regional bands for ceremonies and public events.

title: Premier Band
description: Performs as a musician in the Air Force premier band, the highest-level musical unit.

title: Security Forces
description: Provides base security, law enforcement, and force protection for Air Force installations.

title: Security Forces - Military Working Dog Handler
description: Handles and trains military working dogs for patrol, detection, and force protection missions.

title: Security Forces - Combat Arms
description: Specializes in weapons training and marksmanship instruction for combat arms qualification.

title: Health Services Management
description: Manages medical facility operations, patient administration, and health records.

title: Medical Materiel
description: Manages medical supply inventory, procurement, and distribution for Air Force medical facilities.

title: Biomedical Equipment
description: Maintains and repairs complex medical diagnostic and therapeutic equipment.

title: Bioenvironmental Engineering
description: Identifies and evaluates occupational and environmental health hazards on Air Force installations.

title: Mental Health Service
description: Assists psychologists and psychiatrists in providing mental health care and substance abuse treatment.

title: Diet Therapy
description: Plans and prepares therapeutic diets and provides nutritional counseling for patients.

title: Public Health
description: Monitors and controls communicable diseases, food safety, and environmental health programs.

title: Cardiopulmonary Laboratory
description: Performs diagnostic cardiac and pulmonary tests including EKGs and stress tests.

title: Physical Medicine
description: Provides physical therapy, orthopedic, and occupational therapy support to patients.

title: Aerospace and Operational Physiology
description: Trains aircrews on physiological aspects of flight and provides altitude chamber training.

title: Aerospace Medical Service
description: Provides primary care, emergency medical treatment, and aeromedical support to aircrews.

title: Surgical Services
description: Assists surgeons in the operating room and manages surgical supplies and instruments.

title: Pharmacy
description: Prepares and dispenses medications and manages pharmaceutical supplies at military pharmacies.

title: Diagnostic Imaging
description: Performs X-ray, CT, MRI, and other diagnostic imaging procedures.

title: Medical Laboratory
description: Performs clinical laboratory tests on blood, urine, and tissue samples to support diagnosis.

title: Histopathology
description: Prepares and analyzes tissue specimens to assist in disease diagnosis.

title: Optometry
description: Assists optometrists in providing vision care and fabricates and dispenses eyewear.

title: Dental Assistant
description: Assists dentists in clinical procedures and manages dental records and supplies.

title: Dental Laboratory
description: Fabricates dental prosthetics, crowns, and orthodontic appliances.

title: Paralegal
description: Provides legal assistance and supports military justice processes and administrative law functions.

title: Chaplain Assistant
description: Supports chaplains in providing religious services and pastoral care to military personnel.

title: Contracting
description: Procures supplies, services, and construction through competitive contracting processes.

title: Financial Management and Comptroller
description: Manages Air Force budgets, accounting, military pay, and financial operations.

title: Special Investigations
description: Conducts criminal investigations, counterintelligence operations, and fraud inquiries.

title: Academy Military Training NCO
description: Supervises and trains cadets at Air Force Academy and officer training programs.

title: Language and Culture Adviser
description: Provides foreign language and cultural expertise to support operational commanders.

title: Postal
description: Manages mail delivery, postal operations, and finance services for military personnel.

title: Missile Facility Manager
description: Manages and maintains missile launch facility infrastructure and support systems.

title: Unit Deployment Manager
description: Plans and manages unit deployment readiness, personnel accountability, and mobility actions.

title: Interpreter/Translator
description: Provides foreign language interpretation and translation services in support of military operations.

title: Scientific Applications Specialist
description: Monitors nuclear treaty compliance and detects nuclear detonations using technical collection systems.
